text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, we gather in the gym for an announcement from Mejiro
McQueen on behalf of her family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Dear students and esteemed trainers. It is my pleasure to bring you an
announcement from the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In the near future, we will be hosting a party to help foster exchange
and camaraderie. There will be no dress code, so feel free to come as
you are.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Huh. So the Mejiro family's throwing a casual party. It's cool how
they're always running events for us. Are you gonna go?

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
I'll see you there, then. Oh, by the way—did you hear? A lot of folks
tried out for Satono Diamond's trainer trials, but...

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: They say nobody passed. Makes you wonder what she'll do now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day of the party. As I'm walking around, I spot Satono
Diamond and Kitasan Black playing a board game.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh? In reversi, you need to take the edges or you'll lose! Are you
sure you want to go there, Dia?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Mhm! Everyone says you'll lose if you don't get the corners, but...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's just a superstition! Jinx, curse... whatever it be, I'll win and
prove it wrong!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Aw, here we go—you've found another jinx to break! I know exactly
how this'll go...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Satono Diamond takes a convincing win. Turns out the
mild-mannered young lady has an unexpected side to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems whenever she encounters a jinx or superstition, she's driven
to prove it wrong. It's hard to nail down just what kind of person she
is, but I think—

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Um, may I have a moment? I saw you the other day, didn't I?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You were watching me at the scrimmage, right? Um... I'd like to ask
you something.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Is there a reason you didn't come to my trainer trials? You seemed
interested, so I thought you'd be there.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
If I didn't pass muster in your eyes, can I ask why? Is it just that I lack
potential?
choice_data_list: Not at all! If anything, it's because...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her the truth—while she has the makings of an incredible racer,
I'm just a run-of-the-mill trainer. It's a wide gap I'm not good enough
to cross.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: A wide gap? But that's not...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I can understand why you'd be hesitant, but humility in excess
is only self-deprecation.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh, McQueen! ♪ Good evening. Thank you for having us!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Good evening. I bid you welcome, Satono—as well as your young
trainer acquaintance. May I intrude upon your conversation?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Satono's family does run a major conglomerate, but I wouldn't say
she's difficult to approach. Her trainer trials might have sounded
intimidating...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But that only means she's taking it seriously.
Isn't that so, Satono?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's right. My trainer has to be someone I can entrust with my
dream—the Satono family's dearest wish.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The Satono family isn't as historied as others, but we have a deep
love for Umamusume racing and want it to flourish.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We help with events, charity work, and whatever else we can. But
we're young compared to the Mejiro family, and the greatest
contribution of all has always been beyond us.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes. Producing a G1 race winner from our family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Skilled racers are the lifeblood of our sport. There is no greater
contribution one can make than producing a renowned racer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond has accepted the weight of that grand ambition.
Through her trainer trials, she hoped to find someone who would bear
it with her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The Satono Group isn't chasing status, but a goal it's never been able
to grasp.
Isn't that right, Satono?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...Yes. Everything I do is to fulfill my family's dream. So I'll exhaust
every option to find someone capable of chasing it with me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I want your opinion as a trainer—what did you think of my racing?
That look in your eyes when you were watching me—I can't stop
thinking about it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks me in the eye with such intensity, it feels as if my answer is
the most important thing in the world to her right now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It would be disrespectful to not be honest with her. I start by praising
her incredible talent, then move on to the areas I think she could
improve in.
choice_data_list:
I think you're inexperienced with real
competition.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Real competition? What do you mean?
choice_data_list: During the race, you felt pressured, right?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh. I did, now that you mention it. I've never been marked so hard
before—it was difficult to run how I wanted.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But I've raced against training partners since I was little. I always told
them to never hold back.
choice_data_list: They might have held back subconsciously.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I can see that. It's common for those of our status. Since we're in
positions of power, others hesitate to run aggressively against us,
even if they don't realize it.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I-I see! I've never thought about it like that. No wonder I felt so
hemmed in...
choice_data_list: Another thing—you get worked up too easily.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Worked up? No one's ever told me that before. What do you
mean?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her what I saw. Around the halfway mark, she needed to bide
her time, but she felt pressured to speed up by those closing in on
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She let herself get worked up. Under her mild-mannered demeanor,
she has a natural competitiveness waiting to rear its head.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I do remember that! In that moment, my legs were itching to break ahead...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But I regained my composure right after. At least, I thought I did. To
think you still noticed...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Just... who are you? Why were you able to gleam so much about me
from a single race?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That fascination let me see past her family name and grasp who she
really was as a runner, both her strengths and weaknesses.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Nobody's... ever told me that before. Not even the trainers at the
trial. But you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, what a stroke of luck. To think you'd find such a promising
candidate at a party.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Satono, might I suggest holding a trial for this trainer? I know the
Satono Group has high standards, but—

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: You're hired.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You're hired! From now on... you're my trainer! You're the exact
person I've been looking for! So, you're hired!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Pardon?! Um, Satono?! Are you certain? You must know how
momentous this decision is for your family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Don't let your emotions carry you away! At least go home and talk to
your—

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
No, I've made my decision. As much as I respect you, McQueen, I
won't budge on this.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
My trainer is right here—nobody else will do! Normally, I'd consult my
family first, but...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
If diving in headfirst is ill-advised, then it's just another jinx—which
means I have to break it! No matter what anyone says, you're my
trainer!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I've decided, and that's that! You'll accept, right? Right? Right?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her firm insistence is a stark contrast to her usual mild-mannered self.
In the end, she doesn't let me go until I agree to be her trainer.
